content:
## MARKET OVERVIEW

**1. What is the Current Market Regime?**
NEUTRAL — normal volatility (Vol: 26.4%) with very narrow participation (Breadth: 0/8 sectors positive); market lacks breadth despite muted vol.

**2. Which sectors are leading?**
Transportation (least weak) led by THYAO (1W: +0.00% | 1M: +10.70%) NEUTRAL and Construction & REIT led by ALARK (1W: -1.36% | 1M: +5.67%) CORRECTION; Heavy Industry shows pockets of strength: TOASO (1W: +1.05% | 1M: +13.34%) ABOVE TREND.

**3. Which sectors are lagging?**
Technology & Telecom and Energy & Chemicals are the clear laggards: KONTR (1W: -40.65% | 1M: -53.50%) BELOW TREND and GUBRF (1W: -7.37% | 1M: -13.18%) BELOW TREND; Banking also under pressure: VAKBN (1W: -8.25% | 1M: +4.60%) CORRECTION.

## STOCK PERFORMANCE

**4. Top Performing Stocks?**
TOASO (1W: +1.05% | 1M: +13.34%) ABOVE TREND; EREGL (1W: +0.80% | 1M: +4.31%) ABOVE TREND; THYAO (1W: +0.00% | 1M: +10.70%) NEUTRAL; MGROS (1W: -0.57% | 1M: +5.31%) CORRECTION; CCOLA (1W: -1.25% | 1M: -1.12%) BELOW TREND.

**5. Worst Performing Stocks?**
KONTR (1W: -40.65% | 1M: -53.50%) BELOW TREND; HEKTS (1W: -15.72% | 1M: -14.25%) BELOW TREND; HALKB (1W: -12.22% | 1M: +2.38%) CORRECTION; TRMET (1W: -10.70% | 1M: +0.56%) CORRECTION; SASA (1W: -9.71% | 1M: -4.92%) BELOW TREND.

**6. Momentum Stocks?**
KONTR (1W: -40.65% | 1M: -53.50%) BELOW TREND; HEKTS (1W: -15.72% | 1M: -14.25%) BELOW TREND; HALKB (1W: -12.22% | 1M: +2.38%) CORRECTION; TRMET (1W: -10.70% | 1M: +0.56%) CORRECTION; SASA (1W: -9.71% | 1M: -4.92%) BELOW TREND.

## SECTOR OUTLOOK

**7. Banking Sector Outlook?**
Banks are under short-term pressure despite solid 1M gains; AKBNK (1W: -4.81% | 1M: +20.62%) CORRECTION, GARAN (1W: -4.44% | 1M: +11.96%) CORRECTION, ISCTR (1W: -5.75% | 1M: +10.96%) CORRECTION, YKBNK (1W: -5.15% | 1M: +22.14%) CORRECTION — watch for follow-through selling or a short squeeze if liquidity tightens.

**8. Industrial Sector Outlook?**
Heavy industry mixed: TOASO (1W: +1.05% | 1M: +13.34%) ABOVE TREND and EREGL (1W: +0.80% | 1M: +4.31%) ABOVE TREND show leadership, while FROTO (1W: -5.99% | 1M: +2.61%) CORRECTION, KRDMD (1W: -2.52% | 1M: -0.86%) BELOW TREND and ASELS (1W: -9.07% | 1M: -1.78%) BELOW TREND lag.

**9. Energy & Chemicals Outlook?**
Sector under heavy pressure and disqualified in quant rank; TUPRS (1W: -2.19% | 1M: -7.20%) BELOW TREND, GUBRF (1W: -7.37% | 1M: -13.18%) BELOW TREND, SASA (1W: -9.71% | 1M: -4.92%) BELOW TREND — avoid catch-up long positions until base confirmed.

## PORTFOLIO STRATEGY

**10. Portfolio Recommendation?**
Trim cyclicals and reduce gross exposure; favor high-quant, above-trend industrial leaders (TOASO, EREGL) and selective retail names while keeping tight stops — avoid weak energy and tech names until breadth recovers.

## NEXT WEEK OUTLOOK

**11. Stocks to Watch Next Week?**
KONTR (1W: -40.65% | 1M: -53.50%) BELOW TREND for reversal or capitulation; TOASO (1W: +1.05% | 1M: +13.34%) ABOVE TREND for continuation; AKBNK (1W: -4.81% | 1M: +20.62%) CORRECTION for bank-flow signals; HEKTS (1W: -15.72% | 1M: -14.25%) BELOW TREND for tradeable bounce.

**12. Sectors to Watch Next Week?**
Energy & Chemicals for continued dispersion and potential washouts; Technology & Telecom for risk of further downside; Banking for liquidity-driven reversals.

**13. Key Levels & Triggers?**
Watch XU100 reaction to 20-day MA and recent support (failure to hold weekly support would raise risk-off); catalysts: domestic CPI and CBRT commentary, major earnings releases, and global risk sentiment (US CPI/PMI, EM flows).

EXECUTIVE SUMMARY
Market sits NEUTRAL with normal vol but zero-sector breadth — leadership concentrated in a few industrial names. Trade cautiously: overweight selective above-trend heavy-industry stocks, underweight energy and tech, and use tight stops given narrow participation and headline risk.
